3333290.name: Chef Brawl Demo
3333290.description:
Step into the chaos of competitive cooking in this multiplayer kitchen showdown! In the demo, up to 4 players face off in a specially designed kitchen arena with one goal: be the fastest and most precise chef to complete three signature dishes.

But watch out – this kitchen fights back! Unleash monster boosters to sabotage your rivals, stunning and slowing them down while you race against the clock. Time your attacks strategically as you dash between cooking stations, dodge obstacles, and perfect your recipes.

Will you keep your cool under pressure, or crack like an egg in this frantic culinary competition? Download the demo now and prove you're the ultimate Brawl Chef!

Key Demo Features:

  • One action-packed kitchen map

  • Three challenging signature dishes to master

  • Monster booster power-ups for maximum sabotage

  • Fast-paced multiplayer mayhem for up to 4 players
3333290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
